hero.eyebrow: Certified translation for Saudi Arabia and the GCC
hero.title: Certified translation for official documents, delivered with clarity and confidence.
hero.description: Khaleej Translate supports individuals, families, and businesses with certified translation for passports, IDs, certificates, contracts, medical reports, and other documents prepared for official use.
hero.quoteCardTitle: Estimate the starting cost before you send the file.
hero.quoteCardDescription: Choose the document type, page count, and turnaround to receive an instant starting estimate for your request.
trustItems: Clear support for official submissions, embassies, universities, and business requirements.
Arabic with English, French, German, Turkish, Urdu, and other major language pairs.
Digital delivery with courier options when you need stamped hard copies.

services.title: Certified translation services for the documents that matter most.
services.description: We support individuals, families, companies, and professional firms with careful review, clear turnaround, and dependable delivery.

items.title: Personal documents
items.body: IDs, passports, family records, birth certificates, marriage certificates, and other civil documents prepared for official submission.

items.title: Legal translation
items.body: Contracts, powers of attorney, court papers, company resolutions, and other legal documents translated with accurate terminology.

items.title: Academic translation
items.body: Certificates, transcripts, recommendation letters, and educational records prepared for admissions, equivalency, and scholarship requests.

items.title: Medical translation
items.body: Medical reports, discharge summaries, insurance files, and hospital documents reviewed carefully for clarity and consistency.

items.title: Business translation
items.body: Commercial registrations, HR files, internal policies, tenders, and correspondence for companies operating across the Gulf.

items.title: Urgent delivery
items.body: Same-day and express options are available for urgent requests that need faster review, approval, and delivery.

documents.title: Frequently requested document types, prepared for official submission.
documents.description: Whether you need a single certificate or a full business file, we handle the document categories most commonly requested across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.

process.title: A clear process from file review to final delivery.
process.description: We confirm the scope, turnaround, and delivery method before work begins so you know exactly what to expect.

items.title: Send your files
items.body: Upload the document or send it on WhatsApp with the target language, deadline, and any special requirements.

items.title: Receive a confirmed quote
items.body: Our team reviews the file and confirms the price, delivery time, and whether you need a stamped or courier copy.

items.title: Translation and quality check
items.body: The document is translated, reviewed carefully, and formatted clearly for official submission or professional use.

items.title: Delivery
items.body: Receive the final file digitally, with courier delivery available when a stamped hard copy is required.

quoteCalculator.title: Estimate the starting cost before you send your file.
quoteCalculator.description: Use the calculator for a fast starting estimate, then share the document for a confirmed quote based on the exact language pair and formatting needs.
quoteCalculator.smartPricing: Pricing changes by document type, turnaround, and delivery method.
highlights: Useful for passports, IDs, certificates, contracts, and medical reports.
Standard, priority, and express options are available for urgent requests.
A confirmed quote is provided after we review the file and target language.
quoteCalculator.uploadDescription: Accepted formats: PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, and DOCX.
quoteCalculator.note: This is a starting estimate. Final pricing depends on the document, language pair, clarity, and layout requirements.

competitiveEdge.title: Translation service designed around accuracy, speed, and peace of mind.
competitiveEdge.description: Every request is handled with the professionalism expected for official documents, business submissions, and time-sensitive files.

items.title: Clear communication

items.title: Official-document focus

items.title: Responsive support

items.title: Professional presentation
items.body: Names, dates, terminology, and layout are reviewed carefully to keep the final document clear and submission-ready.

coverage.title: Supporting clients across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.
coverage.description: Files can be received online and delivered digitally, making it easy to support individuals and organizations across the region.
coverage.sidebar: We regularly support embassies, universities, law firms, hospitals, HR departments, and private clients who need clear, submission-ready translation.

items.name: Sarah A.
items.quote: The team explained the process clearly from the beginning, reviewed my passport copy quickly, and delivered the translation exactly on time.

items.name: Abdullah M.

items.name: Nour H.

faq.title: Answers to the questions clients ask before sending their documents.
faq.description: If your request is urgent or your document is unusual, send it to us and we will confirm the best service for it.

items.a: We translate passports, IDs, certificates, contracts, medical reports, court papers, commercial documents, and many other official files.

items.q: How can I send my files?
items.a: You can upload them through the quotation form or send them directly on WhatsApp for a quick review.

items.q: How long does translation usually take?
items.a: Turnaround depends on the document type, page count, and language pair. Standard, priority, and express options are available.

items.q: Do you provide stamped hard copies?
items.a: Yes. Stamped copies and courier delivery can be arranged when required for official submission.
We support Arabic with English, French, German, Turkish, Urdu, Spanish, Russian, Italian, Chinese, and other requested language pairs.

items.q: How is the final price confirmed?
items.a: The final quote depends on the document type, page count, language pair, urgency, and any formatting or certification requirements.

cta.title: Need a certified translation quote?
cta.description: Send the document, specify the target language, and our team will reply with the best option for turnaround and delivery.

servicesPage.title: Translation services for personal, professional, and official documents.
servicesPage.description: From single-page certificates to detailed legal and medical files, we provide certified translation with clear turnaround and delivery options.
servicesPage.languagesTitle: Language combinations requested most often in Saudi Arabia and the GCC.
servicesPage.languagesDescription: If your required language is not listed, send the file and destination language and we will confirm availability before starting.
servicesPage.languagesSidebar: Our most common requests pair Arabic with English, French, German, Turkish, Urdu, Spanish, Russian, Italian, Chinese, and other major international languages.

pricingPage.title: Straightforward pricing for common translation requests.
pricingPage.description: Starting rates are shown for the services clients request most often. Final quotes are confirmed after reviewing the file, language pair, and required turnaround.

plans.title: Standard
plans.body: Suitable for personal documents with digital delivery within 24 to 48 hours.

plans.title: Priority
plans.body: Faster delivery for important academic, business, and personal documents.

plans.title: Legal and complex
plans.body: For contracts, court papers, and terminology-heavy documents that require closer review.

pricingPage.addOnsTitle: Optional services available with your main translation order.
pricingPage.addOnsDescription: Add the services you need when the request requires stamped copies, courier delivery, or faster turnaround.
pricingPage.addOnsSidebar: Our team will confirm availability and timing for any optional service before your order is finalized.
pricingPage.fastTurnaround: Availability depends on the document type and requested deadline.

about.title: A certified translation office built for clarity, accuracy, and dependable service.
about.description: Khaleej Translate supports individuals, families, companies, and institutions that need professional translation for official use across Saudi Arabia and the Gulf.
about.story: We provide certified translation for official documents with a service experience centered on clear communication, careful review, and timely delivery. Clients rely on us for personal documents, legal files, academic records, medical reports, and business paperwork that must be presented in a clean and professional format.
about.valuesTitle: The standards behind every translation request.
about.valuesDescription: From the first message to final delivery, we focus on the details that matter most when a document will be submitted to an embassy, university, employer, court, or government entity.

values.title: Accuracy
values.body: Names, dates, terminology, and document details are reviewed carefully to reduce errors and avoid unnecessary revisions.

values.title: Confidentiality
values.body: Personal, legal, and medical files are handled with respect for privacy throughout the quotation, translation, and delivery stages.

values.title: Responsiveness
values.body: We reply quickly through WhatsApp and email so clients can confirm pricing, timing, and delivery without delay.

contact.title: Send your documents and receive a confirmed translation quote.
contact.description: Share your files, preferred language, and deadline. We will review the request and guide you to the right service and delivery option.
contact.formIntro: Use the form to prepare your request. When you continue, a prefilled WhatsApp message will open so our team can review the details quickly.
contact.whatsappIntro: Hello Khaleej Translate, I would like a quotation for the following documents:

form.name: Full name
form.uploadHint: You can select multiple files before continuing to WhatsApp.

blogPage.title: Helpful guidance for certified translation requests in Saudi Arabia and the GCC.
blogPage.description: Read practical articles about document preparation, official submission requirements, delivery timelines, and translation best practices.

blogPreview.title: Guides that answer the questions clients ask before sending their documents.
blogPreview.description: Explore practical advice on certified translation, document preparation, medical and legal files, and official submission requirements.

blogDetails.readyTitle: Need help with a similar document?
blogDetails.readyDescription: Send the file on WhatsApp or through the quotation form and our team will review the best translation option for you.

supportChat.title: Service assistant
supportChat.subtitle: Quick answers about document translation, delivery times, and pricing
supportChat.note: For a confirmed quote, send your file with the target language and deadline on WhatsApp or through the quotation form.
supportChat.intro: Welcome to Khaleej Translate. I can help you understand document types, turnaround options, pricing, and how to start your request.
prompts: How long does passport translation take?
How can I get a price quote?
Can I send my files on WhatsApp?

replies.pricing: Pricing depends on the document type, number of pages, language pair, and requested turnaround. Personal documents usually start from the standard rate, while contracts and specialized files are quoted after review.
replies.turnaround: Standard delivery is usually within 24 to 48 hours. Priority and same-day options are available for urgent requests after we review the file.
replies.documents: We translate passports, IDs, academic certificates, contracts, court papers, medical reports, commercial records, and many other official documents.
replies.languages: We support Arabic with English, French, German, Turkish, Urdu, Spanish, Russian, Italian, Chinese, and other requested language pairs.
replies.contact: You can send your document on WhatsApp or use the quotation form. Include the target language, deadline, and whether you need a stamped hard copy.
replies.fallback: I can help with document types, delivery time, pricing, language pairs, and how to send your files. Ask any service question and I will guide you to the next step.

terms.title: Terms and conditions
terms.description: Please review the terms that govern quotation, delivery, and use of our translation services.

sections.title: Quotations and scope
sections.body: Prices, delivery times, and service details depend on the document type, language pair, page count, formatting needs, and urgency of the request.

sections.title: Client responsibility
sections.body: Clients are responsible for sending clear and complete files and for reviewing names, dates, and target language details before final approval.

sections.title: Delivery timelines
sections.body: Estimated delivery times begin after the quotation is approved and the required files and instructions are confirmed. Urgent requests may require separate scheduling.

sections.title: Final format
sections.body: Digital delivery is available for all orders. Stamped copies and courier delivery are arranged when selected as part of the confirmed service.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: We handle uploaded files and personal details with care and use them only to review, process, and deliver the requested service.

sections.title: Files and personal data
sections.body: Uploaded documents and contact details are used only to review the request, prepare the quotation, and complete the translation service.

sections.title: Communication
sections.body: We may contact you by WhatsApp or email to confirm pricing, turnaround, delivery details, or questions related to the submitted files.

sections.title: Access and confidentiality
sections.body: Access to client files is limited to the team members involved in reviewing, translating, and delivering the request.

sections.title: Retention
sections.body: Documents and request details are retained only for the period reasonably needed to complete the service and related follow-up.

footer.description: Certified translation office for personal, legal, academic, medical, and corporate documents across Saudi Arabia and the GCC.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested is unavailable. Return to the home page to continue your request.
